steps.title: Represent the total signatures
steps.content:
The student collected $40$ signatures on Monday and $s$ additional signatures on Tuesday. Add those amounts to represent the total:
$$s+40$$

steps.title: Apply the minimum requirement
steps.content:
The phrase "at least $210$" means the total must be greater than or equal to $210$. That gives the inequality
$$s+40\ge210$$

steps.title: Check the answer choices
steps.content: Choice A uses at most instead of at least. Choices C and D subtract Monday's signatures instead of adding them. Choice B correctly says the total number of signatures is at least $210$. The answer is B.
